title: A Delicate Balance: The Truth
overview: A Delicate Balance: The Truth" is a great documentary that is about the detrimental health and environmental effects of consuming animal based foods. This Documentary will leave each person fully informed as to some of the causes these illnesses and offers ways of improving human health.
